reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for physiotherapy in Delhi.

review_content.Placements: College contains a placement cell which is responsible for placements of students and also sends the students to various hospitals for internships and clinical training. Some students are working in AIIMS Delhi as physiotherapists, and some are also working in research centres and rehab centres.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus of the college is not too large, but it has all the facilities required. The college has an anatomy lab, a physiology lab, a sports lab, a research lab, a musculoskeletal lab, and a library. The classes are large enough and all the classes contain ACs and smart boards for teaching. It also has a library in which all books related to the course are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college because of its good faculty members, placements, facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: Physiotherapy is a four and a half years course including 6 months compulsory internship. The placement rate of our college is great. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA-7 LPA, depending on the knowledge and skills of the physiotherapist. Students get recruited in many hospitals like AIIMS Safdarjung, Lady Hardinge, Apollo, Max, etc. All the students are interned from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: As our college is situated just near to Govindpuri metro station, it is very convenient to reach there. Classrooms, labs and libraries are well air-conditioned. Our college has general and private OPD to gain practical knowledge. Students can practice manual therapy techniques, application of modalities, etc. Students are made to observe the patient under the guidance of teachers just after completing their 1st year to gain skills and confidence to treat patients. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students. Labs and libraries are well-equipped with sufficient books and study materials. Our college issues the bones and other study materials to students so that they can study at their home also if they can't buy them. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The food provided in the mess and canteen is healthy and nutritious for hostellers and outsiders. Our college also shows immense interest in sports and games as it is related to our course also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is well located with easy commuting facilities, a good library and expert teachers.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell keeps us updated with various vacancies and job opportunities. Our college offers placements in well-reputed hospitals. We are provided with opportunities to be a part of reputed hospitals and get to know more about the field of physiotherapy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well constructed and well spacious. Classrooms are well ventilated and well spacious. Laboratories are equipped with all the latest facilities and equipment related to the course. The library has most of the latest books related to the course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure and transportation.

review_content.Placements: About 100% of the students who apply for placements get placed in various reputed companies like Capri, Optum UnitedHealth, etc., with an average salary package of 3.5 LPA. Every student gets placed in multiple hospitals such as Max, Apollo, Fortis, LNJP, etc., throughout the year in different departments, especially in the 4th year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average here, with completely air-conditioned classrooms. There are smart classrooms with projectors and computers. There is a well-maintained library and different labs such as anatomy, physiology, electro, exercise, biomechanics and OPD with all the machines and equipment needed for treatment. Though I didn't have any experience of the hostel, I have heard that the rooms are huge enough with good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college and teachers. Everyone is helpful throughout my graduation.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is helpful, and it always keeps us updated regarding various vacancies. Various companies like Optum are visiting here to offer jobs. All students get chances for clinical posting during their studies in various private and government hospitals. All students are well-placed for internships too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library has all the required and related books. OPD is also equipped with all required basic physiotherapy equipment and modalities. Laboratories have the basic equipment for practical knowledge. Our college premises has Wi-Fi and a computer lab, and classrooms are also digitalised and air-conditioned.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and facilities, great faculty members, and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Physiotherapy is a 4-year graduation course with 6 months internship. The college has 60 students per year. Placements rate is great. About 70-75% of students get placed in reputed hospitals for internship and jobs. Companies like AIIMS, Safdarjung, Apollo, Max, etc., visit our campus for placements. The salary package offered ranges between 3-7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is just below under Govind Puri metro station Delhi. The college provides air-conditioned classrooms, library and labs. It provides separate hostels for both boys and girls. The college has its own hospital. Quality of food served in canteen and mess is best and nutritious for hostellers and outsiders. Mess staff is very supportive, caring, and they meet every demand of hostel students according to their need. In hostels, they provide free Wi-Fi facility for students. Library and labs are well-equipped with all the sufficient books and equipment. The college shows great interest in sports and games as it is also related to our course.

reviews.review_text:

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college of physiotherapy, BCIP.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs like anatomy lab, physiology lab, musculoskeletal lab, cardio lab, research lab, sports lab, etc. to learn many things and do practicals. Hostels are also present for those who come from other states or very far away. Hostels are very clean and the food is also very healthy. The canteen has a variety of foods available. The classrooms are big and spacious, with beds and chairs, desks, and AC.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of staff shortage, management, placement, extracurricular and campus
reviews.review_text: Everything was pretty average when compared to other private colleges. We didn't have proper classrooms, there weren't benches until we were in second year we just had normal chairs with the book rest ones, and they were introduced only for the first and second years, we didn't even have our own personal Library it was inside the Hotel management course's building and that too was arranged in a very rough way, we weren't given any Wi-Fi, labs were okayish. The hostel rooms were not good at all t...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good academics and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained labs, classrooms with a projector and an air-conditioner, and a library with lots of books. The hostel facility is not very good, and we can find a good PG near the campus. The food available in the canteen is nice. Sports events are organised and it has a good sports background.

The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19805 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Barasat Government Medical College and Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 19805 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27192 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.review_title: This college has highly qualified teachers.

review_content.Placements: I study at GMC, Churu, which was started in the year 2018. Our batch is the second batch of the college. There is no such kind of thing as company placement in medical colleges. But despite being a new college the results of every batch of my colleagues are genuinely good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college building is still under construction, the sports facilities are very poor. There is lots of weed inside the campus, and the hostel rooms are good but there is a shortage of water. Mess's food is pathetic, there is not any kind of sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its teachers, but extremely not satisfied with infrastructure and development.

review_content.Placements: In this college, students get placed as junior residents, as students will be a doctor so they can join any government and private hospital because already there is much scarcity of doctors in a country like India. Around 100% of students are placed. Students will never regret being here, and being a doctor itself is a good thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college building is yet not complete, the duct system has not been installed, Wi-Fi of the library does not work well. There is no proper lighting, even there are only 2 lecture theaters but currently, students have 4 batches in our college. The camps are not good, and no plants at all. The food served is average, and the hostel is good, but sometimes no maid for cleaning.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It's worth it to be a part of this college.

review_content.Placements: As it's a government medical college therefore placements are confirmed and of fix salary. Choice of internship depends on student only as all students are welcomed to do internship at college only. Stipend of 12000 is given. Stipend during the internship is same for all students and even salary for each student is same.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms are fully furnished while all types of possible sports equipments are provided. Canteen is not available right now as this college is just started but it will get started as soon as possible. Quality of food at mess is okay. Hostel rooms are good as it is newly formed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am happy because of its passing rate, but dissatisfied with facilities.

content.Placements: There are 150 seats in each batch. The first batch was in 2018, and there were 100 seats. Currently, the most junior batch was in 2024, and it also has 150 seats. The passing rate of the college and degree is far better than some other colleges. Some students also crack INI CET and NEET PG.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not good enough. It is also under construction now. The hospital is under construction on the college campus. But, there are not enough facilities in the college. There are no AC lecture theatres, but microphones and speakers are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Churu.

content.Placements: It is a government college. Almost 21,00,000 students got placed in this course. Few students opted for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. Hostel and hospitals are under construction. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Projectors are available in all classrooms. There are 2 badminton courts. Drinking water facility is not good. Classrooms are not air-conditioned.
content.Faculty: Teachers are supportive and helpful. They also provide in-depth knowledge to students. The course curriculum is according to NMC. OPD of hospital is very good. Exams are conducted like PCTs, semester exams, and university exams. Quizzes and seminars are not conducted in this college. Around 5-6 students detain every year out of 150 students. All courses are offered in this college.

college_info.intro:
SDNBVC offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in the streams of humanities, science, and commerce. The popular programmes at SDNBVC include B.Sc and B.Com.
B.Sc. at SDNBVC is offered in several specialisations, including Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, Plant Biology, and Plant Biotechnology. The duration of the course is 3 years.
B.Com is also a 3-year programme at SDNBVC.

review_summary.college_name: SDNBVC Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: SDNB is good in placements and academics.

content.Placements: Above 80 percent of our students got placed in various companies. The average package is 2 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Sutherland, TCS, Cognizant. Roles are data analyst, business analyst, technical support. Most of the companies, which means startup companies, make internships for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The labs are well maintained and equipped with required hardware, software, and equipment. The classrooms are very spacious. The mess and canteen food quality is satisfactory. Campus has good sports and game facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities provided.

content.Placements: In our college, we are recruited based on Wipro company. Percentage is also important. The package for it is 2 LPA to 8 LPA. 90 percent of our students are placed. They are working in their dream jobs and are getting good salary as they wished for, and some are in PG.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very modular and clean. The campus is well maintained by the workers and also by the students. The labs are well maintained too, there are no network issues until there is maintenance. The hostel has good facilities, and the infrastructure is very well designed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are good and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 110 students joined our college for BCA degree in my batch. TCS, Wipro, etc. 15 percent of students in my class have gone for training internships in Cognizant company. Most of my classmates are continuously attending placement interviews and attending aptitude tests conducted by the respective company.
content.Infrastructure: I am not a hostel student, so I don’t know about it, but our college canteen facilities and food quality are very good with affordable prices. Medical facilities are also good. I don’t know about sports or games because I am not a sports person. I gave 4-star rating because college Wi-Fi network is very low.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Cognitive Systems) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty and the infrastructure are satisfied.

content.Placements: All students who applied are placed. The package depends upon the organization. The top companies are CTS, Verizon, TCS, and Sutherland. Some of the students completed internships in TCS, and some of the students are doing projects in AWS. Junior associate roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the infrastructure, food, sports, and games are all good. The food is worth the money. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, all the things were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, facilities and faculty members.

content.Placements: 85 percent and above students are placed. This college is good in placement training and internships. Also, more companies are hiring, and more companies are coming for placements. Top companies are Sutherland, TCS, Cognizant, Zoho, Wipro, and LTI Mindtree.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are so nice. Amazing Wi-Fi, labs, and library. Food is not bad. Good infrastructure and excellent facilities. More information can be taken. The infrastructure is good enough to use Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms, which are more helpful. Food is available in the canteen.

admission_overview.title: SDNB Vaishnav College for Women Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SDNB Vaishnav College for Women admissions are offered to students based on academic merit in the last qualifying exam. The college offers Aided and Self Finance courses. The college offers UG, PG and PhD courses. These are offered in fields, such as Arts, Commerce, Management, Science, Social Work, Humanities, Computer Applications, and more. The SDNB Vaishnav College for Women application process is conducted online. The college is affiliated to University of Madras. admission_process.title: SDNB Vaishnav College for Women Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheSDNB Vaishnav College for Women admission processstarts with an eligibility check followed by application submission. Applicants then have to go through selection rounds and admission confirmation. Interested students can follow the steps below to complete the SDNB Vaishnav College for Women admissions:
Application Process 2026

The application procedure is online. Aspirants need to apply at the institute's official website, https://www.sdnbvc.edu.in/admissions/apply-online/, for admission to various programmes. Students can submit the form filled with correct details.
Selection Process 2026

The institute admits students based on merit secured in the last qualifying exam. For UG courses, it is Class 12, while UG marks are considered for PG courses. Similarly, for PhD admission, students have to submit PG marks. The college may consider several other things while making the merit list.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute might release a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for verification of documents and pay theSDNB Vaishnav College for Women feeto confirm their seats in the university.

hostel.description:
Hostel accommodating 250 students, With double, triple, 4 in one rooms, with AC/ NON AC, Common lunch hall, reading room, Gym, Computer browsing room, Washing machine facility. 
The hostel building has ground and 3 floors 12000 sq feet built up area in each floor. 
The Ground floor has 14 rooms excluding the Office, Warden Room, Prayer hall, Visitor’s lounge with TV and Dining Hall. 
First floor has 18 student’s rooms, one Counsellor Room, Study hall, Computer lab (24 numbers) and library.
Second floor have 18 student’s rooms for their accommodation, one staff room and Audio visual room and for their usage. 
Third floor have 28 students rooms. In the adjoining building also 4 very spacious dormitories with bunk cots are available for student’s accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: SDNB is good in placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The labs are well maintained and equipped with required hardware, software, and equipment. The classrooms are very spacious. The mess and canteen food quality is satisfactory. Campus has good sports and game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very modular and clean. The campus is well maintained by the workers and also by the students. The labs are well maintained too, there are no network issues until there is maintenance. The hostel has good facilities, and the infrastructure is very well designed.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are good and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hostel student, so I don’t know about it, but our college canteen facilities and food quality are very good with affordable prices. Medical facilities are also good. I don’t know about sports or games because I am not a sports person. I gave 4-star rating because college Wi-Fi network is very low.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and the infrastructure are satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the infrastructure, food, sports, and games are all good. The food is worth the money. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, all the things were good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are so nice. Amazing Wi-Fi, labs, and library. Food is not bad. Good infrastructure and excellent facilities. More information can be taken. The infrastructure is good enough to use Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms, which are more helpful. Food is available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The lab and washroom infrastructure is clean and tidy, and they are very well maintained. Can’t deny that. The labs are also very comfortable to use. They are well maintained at the same time. The lab in-charges are very friendly and help whoever needs their help.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment to learn and build more confidence.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and lab facilities are good and excellent, but the network is very low and slow. Kindly increase the network speed. Hostel facilities are good, and the food is good to eat and clean. Sometimes we can’t get food due to too much crowd.

reviews.review_heading: Suggest this college for your bright future.
reviews.review_text: Very comfortable and very good infrastructure. Every lab has a Wi-Fi connection and a well-cleaned campus. The canteen is too good. Here they provide extracurricular activities. They give importance to study and even sports. Very good infrastructure, and the classrooms are very spacious and breathable.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the placement and college environment.
reviews.review_text: Our lab is very good to use, but most of the time network issues occur. The hostel is very strict and the food is not good. Canteen food is good. Medical facilities are also good. I don’t know clearly about sports in our college, but except carrom, all sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, mainly good placement in our college.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in our college, they are good. Wi-Fi connection and moderate lab facilities and excellent library look good. Classrooms are good. Moderate quality of food in our college and good facilities in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with average placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are Wi-Fi, moderate labs, classrooms, excellent library. overview_faqs.question: Is Mount Zion Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Mount Zion Medical College is a well-known institution for MBBS, MS, MD, B.Sc. courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Mount Zion Medical College has a rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Mount Zion Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a good infrastructure and a good environment to study. It has good facilities.

content.Placements: In my course, 150 students enrolled during the time of admission. After the course, all students try to achieve a post-graduate degree which is an MD. Almost all students get internships after 4.5 years. The doctor profession itself is the top role offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is situated about 8 kilometers away from the town area. It consists of 5 buildings, an academic block, a hospital building, 2 men's hostels, and 2 women's hostels. The academic building consists of lecture halls which are equipped with the latest technological devices. On the further floor of the building, there is a library well-equipped with medical books that one wants. Unlimited Wi-Fi is also available during working hours. The hostel is near to the academic building and the food provided is average. The hospital has the latest advanced facilities each patient wants.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with this college. It has good faculty members.

content.Placements: My batch consists of 100 students. It has a total of 100 seats and all of them are filled during the admission procedure. Almost 95% of students get internships in the college. After graduation, all the students get placements in different hospitals, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are 5 main buildings on the campus. Our college provides a well-equipped library and Wi-Fi availability. All the lecture halls are equipped with advanced technological gadgets. The hostel buildings are near the academic block and the food provided is of average quality. The college has different courts for each sport.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amount Zion College Review.

content.Placements: MBBS is a course of 5.5 years duration, and the last 1 year is for an internship, where we work as interns in the same college hospital. We will get a stipend of not less than Rs 10,000 in our college. Hostel facilities are available for interns, but mess food is not provided.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned. Hospital infrastructure has now been improved. The quality of facilities in the hostel is very poor. Food quality is of low standard and should be improved. Sports and other extracurricular activities are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college. Good placements and helpful faculty members. Good study environment.

content.Placements: My college consists of 100 students, and the course I study is MBBS. After the course, one shall opt for higher education or can work in a hospital. Almost 80 percent of the students get internships. One can achieve up to super specialty after MBBS and MD.
content.Infrastructure: My college consists of 5 buildings: an academic block, a hospital block, doctor's quarters, and two separate hostels for both boys and girls. The academic block consists of a well-maintained library having unlimited Wi-Fi facilities and having many medical books. 4 lecture halls are there, all fully air-conditioned and with sufficient lighting. All of them have smart boards and projectors in them. The hostel rooms are clean and well maintained. They are separate for both boys and girls. The mess hall is near to the hostel. The food quality is average.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Should choose if you are mainly focused on academics. But events and infrastructure are less.

content.Placements: Almost all students who completed the course were placed as interns for 1 year in the hospital with a stipend of around 10000. After completion, one may get appointed as a junior resident in the same college or other medical with a starting salary of around 20000 per month. The maximum salary offered is around 60000 per month in some private sectors. It's better to pursue specialization for better opportunities and a better salary.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hospital is pretty decent and it's developing at a fast rate. But the academic wing is pretty old-dated in terms of infrastructure and technologies used in the lecture hall. Lecture halls are air conditioned. The roof of lecture halls at the top level may leak during heavy rain. And during heavy rain, the faculty's voice is distorted and not clear.

There are only two people in a room with an attached bathroom. Only the food is lacking and is a bland tasting. Often the students go outside and eat food

reviews.review_heading: Faculties should be more knowledgable
reviews.review_text: overall facilities of hostel are good, sometimes water is a problem during hot season , but it will be dealt with at the earliest, the area is somewhat intoo the town, sometimes people find it difficult to reach here ..so many of the prefer to go hospitala at town  , recently patiens are more at our hospital .

reviews.review_heading: An honest opinion about the college- both positives and negatives.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty much basic. Labs are ordinary without any new advanced equipment. Just about fine enough to run a medical college. Wi-Fi is there in the library only. The library is open for 12 hours, 7.30 am to 7.30 pm. Quality of mess is bad. Recently, there was an incident of food poisoning as well. A new mess has been built, and since then things have improved. The students decide on the menu themselves. Sports and games: although the college does not show enough ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good placement and a well maintained infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our academic campus consists of four buildings: one academic block, two hostels (separate for men and women), and one hospital block. All the buildings are very well maintained. Inside the academic block, a well-efficient library is situated with 24/7 Wi-Fi availability. The library works during academic hours only.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and well constructed infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college campus consists of 4 buildings 1 academic block, 2 hostels separate for both boys and girls, and a hospital block. The academic block consists of 4 lecture halls and a library that works from morning to evening 5 pm. with Wi-Fi availability during the working hours.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college if you have no other option.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi and free water, nothing more than that. There are free books to be read at the library. Hostel food is very average; a lot of times, they have been caught in malpractices. But it is better now. Sports events are there, but once a year. The football field is small, and the ground accommodates only 15 people max.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college to study in, with a conducive study environment and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college contains good infrastructure: a hospital, academic building, well-stocked medical library with working-time Wi-Fi availability, two hostels for men, and two for ladies. There is a well-maintained mess hall and a nearby canteen. Hostel rooms are hygienic with attached bathroom facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to study, good placements and highly educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure and many buildings for the smooth academics and studying environment. Far from the town but easily availability of facilities. Working hours Wi-Fi is available in the library for the students as well as the faculty members. Have two separate mess for both boys and girls. Consists of 2 hostels each for boys and girls. Near to the college lies medical college hospital building. All kinds of emergency services and proper hospital is maintained with high patie...

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful college to study and enjoy life along with studying, making good memories.
reviews.review_text: Our college consists of 6 buildings: 1 academic building, 4 hostels (2 for men and 2 for women), and a hospital. The academic building consists of lecture halls, a library, faculty rooms, examination halls, etc. The library is equipped with Wi-Fi and is fully air-conditioned. It is properly ventilated, providing a typical and good space for studying and reading.

reviews.review_heading: While the infrastructure is average, they still strive to improve the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only in the library. Hostel facilities are good with average latrine facilities and food. Sports facilities are good, and the Union works effectively. There is no gym, but the environment is good. The college usually has average functional buildings for the library, laboratories, lecture halls, etc. Classrooms are large with air conditioning.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 3 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital offers courses such as MD and MS. Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital fee structure for all the courses is around INR 74,354.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital has course specializations in Anesthesiology, General Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Emergency Medicine.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital?

review_content.General: Classrooms will be clean and neat. There will be adequate facilities needed for a student. But you should not expect facilities like AC and others because since it is a government college, you cannot expect that kind of facilities. There will be Wi-Fi in the hostel, but in the classroom, Wi-Fi facilities are not provided. A common library is present for both boys and girls. Professors will also use that library. All kinds of books, both Indian authors and foreign authors books, will be there in n the library. There will be adequate facilities in the hostel. Mess food will be quiet. Everyday non-veg will be provided as extra except for Friday. Coffee, tea, and milk will be provided in the morning and evening. Snacks will be provided in the evening. Since it is a medical college, a hospital will be nearby. Sports are given importance in our college. Sports such as football, volleyball, basketball, and cricket are given importance.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Anesthesiology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Evaluation of the Government Medical College and Hospital in Sivagangai.

review_content.Placements: Students at GSMCH have excellent placement options. Students must serve in rural areas for a few years after completing the MD program. Community involvement and real-world experience are highly valued at the college. An internship is required after the MD Anesthesiology course. The internship offers a very good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent facilities for all of its offerings. Almost four to five rooms have one wireless outlet. Though certain rooms may require three students to reside there, overall, the experience is positive. Each room is designed to accommodate three individuals. Perhaps the kids from North India don't enjoy the food in the mess. The canteen is mediocre. There is access to most sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is small with few facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements after the MBBS course are possible but everyone prepares for NEET PG. After MBBS you can easily get jobs in private hospitals. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 50,000 - Rs 60,000 per month. Placements are not offered in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are minimal. The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are like small coaching centers. Playground is very small. Wi-Fi is available in our hostels. Practical lab is of a very low level. In the library, only fans are available. The library remains open from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Boys are not allowed. Games are not conducted in this college.

individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and clinical exposure.

content.Placements: Since it is government college and medical field, they do not offer placement. There is 1 year internship, after that you can practice anywhere, whereever you want, but you have to register with medical council and get registration number for practice. After getting registration number you can practice anywhere in india.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with good lab facilities and good library facility with AC. Hostel and mess are good. Three students share one room, with Wi-Fi facility. Rooms are spacious, occupied with tables and chairs, study room is available in hostel equipped with Wi-Fi and tables.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life in GSMCH (doctor's journey).

In medical colleges there will be no placements, but there will be a period of internship. The payment for the internship will vary according to the college. In our college, currently interns are paid 25000 monthly.

There will be Wi-Fi in the hostel, but in the classroom, Wi-Fi facilities are not provided. A common library is present for both boys and girls. Professors will also use that library. All kinds of books, both Indian authors and foreign authors books, will be there in ...

reviews.review_heading: Evaluation of the Government Medical College and Hospital in Sivagangai.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent facilities for all of its offerings. Almost four to five rooms have one wireless outlet. Though certain rooms may require three students to reside there, overall, the experience is positive. Each room is designed to accommodate three individuals. Perhaps the kids from North India don't enjoy the food in the mess. The canteen is mediocre. There is access to most sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is small with few facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are minimal. The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are like small coaching centers. Playground is very small. Wi-Fi is available in our hostels. Practical lab is of a very low level. In the library, only fans are available. The library remains open from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Boys are not allowed. Games are not conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life is good for all students, but for Tamil students, ragging is here. The food served in the hostel is very good. The hostel provides chapatis. Seniors are supportive. The hostel has workers who wash clothes. We have to pay for it. I would suggest joining this hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and moderate infrastructure, but it is in a rural area.
reviews.review_text: All required facilities are available with proper labs for each department. The building might be a little old. Currently, expansion is going on. Our mess is not very big or good. The food is just average. Sports and cultural activities take place throughout the year. However, there is not much outside the college, so entertainment is less.

reviews.review_heading: For North Indian students It will be very hard to learn the language and will miss out.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities that the college offers are really good 
There is 1 wifi router for nearly 4, 5 room
Each room is made for 3 people , in some rooms 3 student might be forced to live but over all the experience is good
The Mess food may not be liked by the north indian students.
The canteen is average 
Most of the sports and games are available

review_content.Placements: Companies don't visit our college to offer placements. All the students have to get placements from other colleges like APJ Abdul Kalam University and other good colleges. Our college demands photos of students those who cracked the code of placements outside the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are not well managed and instruments are available which are of no use or very less in numbers that 4 out of 100 students can use them. If students protest against the college, they will hack students' electronic devices to enlist their privacy outside.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students get placed depending upon their ability and potential. Students get placed in many top pharmaceutical companies in India like Cipla. Even many students get internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is an excellent infrastructure in our college for all the courses. But we don't have a hostel facility, but they are planning to provide it in future.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college have an excellent level of knowledge and are highly experienced. They train students in all the fields to make them much capable so that they can work easily in any top company at any position. Our college also provides many industry visits.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy offers M.Pharma. review_content.Placements: About 65% of students in the college are placed. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, while the lowest is 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Glenmark, Cipla, and others visit for placements. Around 90% of students get internships, mainly in pharmaceutical companies offering us B.pharmacy students. Roles offered in our course include quality assurance, quality control, and clinical research.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is well-designed, with four classrooms equipped with digital boards and four laboratories on every floor, stocked with all necessary chemicals. The college also has a library. Wi-Fi facility is directly connected to PCs via cables, and a separate Wi-Fi service is provided by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Almost 78% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. Sun Pharma, Mankind, TCS, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, and Serum Institute are the top recruiting firms. The roles are offered to students as per their capabilities. Internships are also provided, and stipends are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Around 3 students can stay together in each room. Beds, tables, and cupboards are available in the hostel rooms. The food served in the mess is average. Sports are also available at our college. Digital classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, but you should try to join in other colleges.

review_content.Placements: In our college, placements are not much good but average. Our college should work on providing placements for students. Many companies do not visit here to conduct interviews. Top recruiting companies here are Mylan, Glenmark, Sun Pharma, etc. Our college should work on placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and well developed here, but the campus is average. Our college hostel is good, but the college mess is not much good. The facilities provided by our college are enough. Labs are good.
review_content.Faculty: In our college, teachers are good, and they fulfil requirements and provide knowledge. They are not very good, and their teaching quality is average. The course curriculum doesn't make students ready for industry. They only give theoretical education.

overview_faqs.question: Is Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy are B.Pharma, M.Pharma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy has a rating of 2.6 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2, 2.5, 3 and 3 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amrutvahini review by the student.

content.Placements: About 65% of students in the college are placed. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, while the lowest is 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Glenmark, Cipla, and others visit for placements. Around 90% of students get internships, mainly in pharmaceutical companies offering us B.pharmacy students. Roles offered in our course include quality assurance, quality control, and clinical research.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is well-designed, with four classrooms equipped with digital boards and four laboratories on every floor, stocked with all necessary chemicals. The college also has a library. Wi-Fi facility is directly connected to PCs via cables, and a separate Wi-Fi service is provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amrutvahini College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost 78% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. Sun Pharma, Mankind, TCS, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, and Serum Institute are the top recruiting firms. The roles are offered to students as per their capabilities. Internships are also provided, and stipends are good.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Around 3 students can stay together in each room. Beds, tables, and cupboards are available in the hostel rooms. The food served in the mess is average. Sports are also available at our college. Digital classrooms are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, but you should try to join in other colleges.

content.Placements: In our college, placements are not much good but average. Our college should work on providing placements for students. Many companies do not visit here to conduct interviews. Top recruiting companies here are Mylan, Glenmark, Sun Pharma, etc. Our college should work on placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and well developed here, but the campus is average. Our college hostel is good, but the college mess is not much good. The facilities provided by our college are enough. Labs are good.
content.Faculty: In our college, teachers are good, and they fulfil requirements and provide knowledge. They are not very good, and their teaching quality is average. The course curriculum doesn't make students ready for industry. They only give theoretical education.

overview_faqs.question: Is Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty was great.

content.Placements: The college provided internships to every student. A year of internship was mandatory.
content.Infrastructure: The college had centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, well-equipped labs, a library, and an auditorium. The college had renovated hostels, a gymnasium, a sports complex, and a playground. The hostel rooms were great and fully furnished with attached washrooms. The hostel had an attached lawn within its premises. It also had its mess, and the food quality was great.
content.Faculty: Teachers were really helpful and highly qualified. They made learning interesting and easy. There was no semester system. Final exams were conducted annually. 50% was required to pass the exams. The difficulty level of the exams was moderate. There were about 100 seats available every year. The admission process was done on the basis of the NEET UG entrance exam. BDS and MS courses were there. The fee structure was about 5 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is very nice and is very near to the city and has a good patient scale.

content.Placements: As such, there are no package of food in our course and one hundred percent of the students got internship from our college, and the internship is done here in the college only. Students securing more than 75% in 12th grade are given admission here after clearing the NEET exam.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is amazing and it’s surrounded by plants. The lecture theatres are nicely air-conditioned. The departments are very airy and large and have ample space for many patient tackling. The departments are nicely equipped to meet the needs of treatment.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and the services they provide.

content.Placements: Being a dental college, placements are great in the area of dentistry. People opt for foreign courses or private practice. An internship is compulsory for the course and is completed at the college itself. Some people also choose to do a master's after BDS.
content.Infrastructure: Well-furnished labs and departments are there. A fully equipped library with the latest editions of books and foreign authors is also available. Lush green campus with all other amenities like a canteen and sports complex, which also has a gym. Hostels are well furnished and maintained.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in this college. Students get internships from esteemed universities under colleges government and private. Many different roles in our course after completing course practice dentistry, or join any college as a staff.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. There are well-maintained clinical laboratories, and classrooms are properly comfortable for students. The air-conditioners and projector boards are provided. The hostel facility is quite good. The food availability is good, the medical facility is also available in our hostel. There is a sports complex which is great for a healthy lifestyle.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college provides good infrastructure and it well maintained.

content.Placements: Around 100% of seats are filled in our batch. Every year all the seats are filled. Many students become university toppers from this college. BDS course is of around 11 lakhs tuition fee. Almost 100% of students get internships in the same college, only BDS tuition is available here.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the hostel management is very well. Mess is well maintained. Air-conditioner facility is also available. The library is provided in the hostel as well. Boys and girls hostels are different. Both have their different messes and both the hostels have different wardens. Specific outing days are given to the girls.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding S.C.D. Government College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, not satisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: I am not very satisfied with placements. In my course duration, very less amount of students have gotten placements. We can't rely on college for our placements. Every student has to make sure to find an internship on their own, if they want to get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good except canteen. The canteen is not hygienic and the canteen area is overcrowded every time. There is no proper arrangement of fans in the canteen. However, classrooms and library are well-maintained and have proper ventilation.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied because of the college infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: After B.A., you can try giving government exams like UPSC and other exams because the subjects selected in B.A. offer a wide knowledge, such as subjects like history, geography, public administration, political science, and many more. They are beneficial for government exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good course, and the hostel is also good. The hostel provides all necessities which are required by the students, like hot water, separate rooms, and activities like a gym, a library, a canteen, and labs. The quality of the hostel is very good, and even the mess food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the campus and connectivity.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students got internships from the course I pursued. It provides a wide range of opportunities in teaching and also in the field of computer science. One can be recruited by companies like Microsoft, Google, and various software companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of labs, library, and classrooms is appreciated and well-designed. Also, the hostel is well-cleaned and maintained. The food available is neat and clean and also very delicious. Also, the apparatus in the laboratories are working properly.

review_summary.college_name: S.C.D. Government College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All facilities of S.C.D. Government College are good.

content.Placements: Placements of S.C.D. Government College, Ludhiana, is nice compared with other colleges in Ludhiana. Around 85-90 percent of students from our courses got placed through campus recruitment. The placement cell is quite active and provides regular training sessions, mock interviews, aptitude classes, and resume-building workshops, which help students perform confidently during placements. Nearly 60-70 percent of students secured internships during their courses. Internships are offered by so many famous companies. Top roles offered to students from my course are software developer, web developer, data analytics (entry level), system engineer, technical support, and business analyst (junior role).

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: S.C.D. Government College: pay less learn more.

content.Placements: My course started with 67 students. The highest package for my course was 5 LPA, while the lowest was 3 LPA. Almost all the students got internships. Only a few of them were able to get paid internships. Roles such as professor and assistant professor were offered for our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers proper facilities for the students who choose to live in their hostels. The entire campus is furnished with Wi-Fi and has projects in a tiered classroom. Both the college and the hostel have a library of their own. The library at the hostel is open 24/7 for students to study.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, not satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: I am not very satisfied with placements. In my course duration, very less amount of students have gotten placements. We can't rely on college for our placements. Every student has to make sure to find an internship on their own, if they want to get a job.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good except canteen. The canteen is not hygienic and the canteen area is overcrowded every time. There is no proper arrangement of fans in the canteen. However, classrooms and library are well-maintained and have proper ventilation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied because of the college infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: After B.A., you can try giving government exams like UPSC and other exams because the subjects selected in B.A. offer a wide knowledge, such as subjects like history, geography, public administration, political science, and many more. They are beneficial for government exams.
content.Infrastructure: Good course, and the hostel is also good. The hostel provides all necessities which are required by the students, like hot water, separate rooms, and activities like a gym, a library, a canteen, and labs. The quality of the hostel is very good, and even the mess food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the campus and connectivity.

content.Placements: 80% of students got internships from the course I pursued. It provides a wide range of opportunities in teaching and also in the field of computer science. One can be recruited by companies like Microsoft, Google, and various software companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of labs, library, and classrooms is appreciated and well-designed. Also, the hostel is well-cleaned and maintained. The food available is neat and clean and also very delicious. Also, the apparatus in the laboratories are working properly.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities of S.C.D. Government College are good.
reviews.review_text: Very nice facilities are provided to students, such as big and clean classrooms and nice teachers. In my BCA course, the college provides a separate PC (computer) to every student in the lab, and all computers are properly updated with the latest versions and with a high-speed Wi-Fi network. Hostel of S.C.D. Government College, Ludhiana, is also very nice, with a good quality of food and clean rooms, including beds and more amenities. The canteen of this college is very nice and clean. Medical f...

reviews.review_heading: S.C.D. Government College: pay less learn more.
reviews.review_text: The college offers proper facilities for the students who choose to live in their hostels. The entire campus is furnished with Wi-Fi and has projects in a tiered classroom. Both the college and the hostel have a library of their own. The library at the hostel is open 24/7 for students to study.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, not satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good except canteen. The canteen is not hygienic and the canteen area is overcrowded every time. There is no proper arrangement of fans in the canteen. However, classrooms and library are well-maintained and have proper ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied because of the college infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good course, and the hostel is also good. The hostel provides all necessities which are required by the students, like hot water, separate rooms, and activities like a gym, a library, a canteen, and labs. The quality of the hostel is very good, and even the mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the campus and connectivity.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of labs, library, and classrooms is appreciated and well-designed. Also, the hostel is well-cleaned and maintained. The food available is neat and clean and also very delicious. Also, the apparatus in the laboratories are working properly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members but not by placement cell.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is above average. Since it is 105 years old college, some departments are not so good but the newly built departments are nice. Library is big, and reading room is also very comfortable. Most classrooms have smart classes.

reviews.review_heading: A picture-perfect college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has great infrastructure for our course and hostel. If you want to join, you just have to give them proof of your ID card, adhaar card, and photos which is very convenient. If you ask me, I never used that service but I have some friends using it and are very satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: I will not recommend students opt for SCD college as I feel it is one of the worst decisions.
reviews.review_text: One of the worst infrastructure has been provided. Classrooms remain dirty and no facilities are there. It feels like an abandoned place. The library for our department is good. There are no washroom facilities in the department and we have to go far away where washrooms are very ugly and not hygienic. Canteen food is fine but there are few options. No facilities for sports have been given.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience by a first-year student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure from the exterior is quite good. But the classrooms from inside are very old style and need to be upgraded. They are mostly not cleaned. The library is also not good, and it has old books which are of no use. The food quality and the hostel facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best and I am fully satisfied with a good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is also fully furnished. Computer labs and a library are there. Wi-Fi and good infrastructure are provided. The quality of the hostel in my college is also very excellent. My friends stay in the hostel. They tell us about their experience. The food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for someone having a family business and does not want to do academic work.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are nice and big. The computer lab is there but I never used it. Chemistry labs are there. Wi-Fi is not available for students. The hostel facility is good. Food is good in a mess, and it is healthy. Medical facilities are not available as I know from my 3 years of course. Sports options are there.

reviews.review_heading: SCD Government College - All You Need to Know.
reviews.review_text: This college is 124 years old. The classes are big, you get a good number of seats, and there is good space to study. There are separate buildings for each department like Chemistry, Physics, Maths, Commerce, and Arts. My college does have one big ground for athletics, one for cricket, one for football, and also one for hockey. There is also a flower garden called "Gulistaan-e-Sahir."

reviews.review_heading: I just want to say, the college is very good. No ragging is done be anyone.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very good.
The college is very big. Grounds are properly maintained. I would love to suggest this college to other students also. 
Hostels are very neat and clean. Even in hostel mess, the food is very good and clean.
The labs and classrooms are fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.C.D. Government College, Ludhiana .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Rooms are big. There might be issues with old rooms. The college has also completed 100 years after its establishment. There are two canteens where you can get Chinese and tea and coffee. The prices are very good. The environment at the college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A good college having good infrastructure and environment for study.
reviews.review_text:
College has an excellent environment for students to study. 
 teachers are well qualified and trained, their teaching method is also good enough. 
 The college has 4-5 parks, an auditorium hall, library room, labs are available for practical activities, classrooms are also NEET and clean. 
Hostel of the college is well maintained for good for students. 
Hostel mess's food is of good quality and there is a routine for every meal on the daily basis. 
For the physical activities of students college...

college_info.intro:
JNTU Anantapur popular courses are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specialisation in CSE, Artificial Intelligence, Mechanicals, Automobiles, and others. JNTU University Anantapur BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can work as Web Developer, Data Science Engineer, Automotive Developer, Robotics Engineer, and others.
JNTU Ananthapur is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Fintech, General Management, Business Data Analytics, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers and others. faqs.answer: A:    JNTU Anantapur offers a total of 192 seats for its MBA course. The seats are offered based on the merit of the Andhra Pradesh ICET exam. There are other colleges affiliated with JNTU Anantapur that offers MBA seats. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)216Prasad Institute of Technology and Science180This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: How many seats does JNTU Anantapur offer for its MBA course?

faqs.answer: A:    JANTUA admissions are done on entrance-basis. The basic eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 or its equivalent exam with a minimum aggregate of 45%. Hence, you can certainly apply for the BTech course even if you have scored less than 75% in your Class 12 boards. However, BTech admissions at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University are accepted on the basis of valid score obtained in the accepted entrance exams (AP EAMCET, JEE Mains, AP ECET) followed by counselling. Only those who meet the cut-off and satisfy all the parameters will be allocated a seat at the university for the BTech programme.
faqs.question: I have scored 75% in Class 12th. Can I get admission to B.Tech in JANTUA?

faqs.answer: A:    Jawaharlal Nehru Technincal University does offer MOOC IT Software Training for its various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. However, the university does not provide the distance learning mode for its regular courses. Students interested in taking up the MOOC IT Software Training may visit the official website of the university to know further about the online training and its eligibility.

reviews_list.review_title: My experiences in college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the ECE batch is getting more attention from the administration and making the college more responsible for this batch. In our college, companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. are top recruiters. Although we study the course in college, we should definitely study or learn extra courses for future development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is only a girls' hostel in our college, not for boys. Boys should stay in private hostels near the college. For girls, it looks like there is good infrastructure, food and facilities in their hostel. About the college, we have fully equipped labs and a library for peaceful studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: From our college, a few companies only came to recruit us, and some non-IT companies have placed some students. From IT companies, we just applied to companies, and we are waiting. After that, we got free coaching from some companies under the CSR drive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.
