overview_faqs.question: Is there MBA in Fintech at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, there is MBA in Fintech at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur. The MBA course specialisations is a two-years course with four semesters. MBA in Fintech specifically focuses on how technology is applied within the financial services industry, including areas like blockchain, digital banking, and cybersecurity. The subjects offered in the Fintech specialisation at JNTU Anantapur include investment Analysis and Portfolio Management, Financial Modeling, Corporate Restructuring and Business Valuation, Design Thinking & Creativity for Business, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBA course available in JNTU Anantapur?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at JNTU Anantapur. There are three MBA course offered by the university which are MBA General, MBA in Fintech, and MBA in Business Data Analytics. The MBA course are offered in a regular, full-time course. The PG-level course is divided into four semesters that last for two academic years. The course curriculum provides basic information on all sections of a business, including marketing, management, finance, and accounting.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for studying at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur, for UG courses?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees for studying at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur, for UG courses is: B.Tech - 25000 general, 10000 SC/ST B.Arch - 125000general, 62500 SC/ST Pharmacy - 75000 general, 25000 SC/ST.

review_summary.college_name: JNTU Anantapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good college, not as much as IITs or NITs.

content.Placements: 35-40% students passed this year. The highest package is 20 LPA this year, the average is 4.5 LPA, and the recruiting companies are Accenture, LNT, Tech Mahindra, TCS ninja etc. The roles are pursued as a fresher, and some students get the best post.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good in this college compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi is also available. Also, they provide a canteen which is very good, but it is expensive and has a limited quantity. Hostels are also provided up to 1 lac fees per year with AC and without AC. The canteen food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My review of my college, Anurag University.

content.Placements: In my college, the highest package is approximately 21 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. Most top recruiting companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, IBM, and many more small companies also offer many roles for students with level one coding skills.
content.Infrastructure: Anurag University's infrastructure is really good, with beautiful new, unique paintings on the walls of the blocks, and the building design is different, with minimal space for corridors. The college grounds are for different sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experiences in college.

content.Placements: In our college, the ECE batch is getting more attention from the administration and making the college more responsible for this batch. In our college, companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. are top recruiters. Although we study the course in college, we should definitely study or learn extra courses for future development.
content.Infrastructure: There is only a girls' hostel in our college, not for boys. Boys should stay in private hostels near the college. For girls, it looks like there is good infrastructure, food and facilities in their hostel. About the college, we have fully equipped labs and a library for peaceful studying.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: From our college, a few companies only came to recruit us, and some non-IT companies have placed some students. From IT companies, we just applied to companies, and we are waiting. After that, we got free coaching from some companies under the CSR drive.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and maintenance.

content.Placements: A total of 80 percent of the students got placed from our college. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and TCS. A total of 85 percent of students got internships from the college, mostly in Accents, etc. The top roles offered are software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, but access is not given to the students. The Wi-Fi is available to the computers in the labs. The library has a wide range of books written by famous authors in the electronics field. The accommodation in the hostel is also good.

admission_overview.college_name: JNTU Anantapur Admission 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Fee, & Application Process

paragraphs: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur admission 2025will open soon.JNTUAadmission is both entrance and merit-based depending on the course. The university provides undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral-level programmes via its associated colleges. To get admission to either course provided by the university, students need to qualify for the exam with a valid score. The university invites students selected based on entrance exam scores for counselling. Interested students can read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, fees, scholarship, and admission procedure of JNTUA.

JNTUA offers programmes in various fields, such as Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, Technology, Arts, Commerce, and more. These courses are offered across multiple specialisations through the many affiliated colleges of the university. Students can check out the following table to learn about the admission highlights for Jawaharlal Nehru Technical University Anantpur:
JNTUA Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
BTech| MBA| MTech
Download brochure

JNTUA course admissionto all the courses is subject to a valid score in the national/state-level entrance exam along with the fulfilment of the minimum eligibility criteria set by the college. Furthermore, students must participate in the respective counselling for seat allotment. The admissions are based on national-level entrance tests, such as TS EAMCET, AP PGECET, AP ICET, JEE Main, JEE Advanced, GATE, etc. Aspirants can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forJawaharlal Nehru Technical University courses:

JNTUA feeusually ranges from INR 30,000 to INR 4 lakh. The university fee includes multiple components including, special service fees, placement cells, registration, recognition fees, etc. Students must pay the admission fee to confirm their seats at the university. The fee varies depending on the course and specialisation selected by the students. Interested students can check out the table below to know aboutJNTUA fees:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Jawaharlal Nehru Technical University Anantapur offers seats through its various affiliated colleges and the university campus. The seat intake may vary depending on the course and specialisation selected by the students. Students must participate in the counselling for seat allotment. Aspirants can check out theJNTUA seat intakein the following table:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The admission process at JNTUA follows a set procedure every year. It involves an application process, shortlisting of students, release of merit list, counselling, and seat allotment. Below are the details of each stage of the admission process:1. To take admission to the courses offered at JNTUH, students are required to visit the official website of the respective national-level entrance exam conducting bodies. They need to fill out the application form in online mode.
For the remaining programme students are required to apply directly from the official website of JNTUA.

2. Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH) creates a shortlist of students based on their scores in the respective accepted entrance exams, such as TS EAMCET, GATE, GPAT, etc. The state-level exam conducting bodies, such as TS ICET, release course-wise merit lists for MBA and MCA courses, whereas the university itself releases a merit list for courses based on merit or national-level exams.

3. Once the merit list is released, eligible students are invited for counselling rounds. For MBA and MCA courses, the counselling is overseen by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE), which is known as the TS ICET Counselling. Similarly, for admission to the BTech program, theTS EAMCET Counsellingis held.
4. As per the round of counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Further, the selected students can confirm their admission by paying the course fees.
lists: BTech/ BPharm aspiring students can apply for the programme on the official website of TS EAMCET.
For the MTech/ MSc programme, the students are required to register on the official website of TS PGECET.
For MBA programme, students must register on the official website of AP ICET or TSCIET.

MBA admission is based on an entrance exam followed by counselling.APICET/CAT/MAH CET/TSICETare a few of the national-level entrance exams the university accepts for MBA. Candidates must visit the official website of the accepted exam to register. JNTUA offers the course through its various affiliated colleges. The MBA programme is spread across three specialisations: General Management,Fintech, andBusiness Data Analytics. Read on for more information on theJNTUA MBA programme.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for an MBA at JNTUA?
faqs.answer: Candidates who has a bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate in any subject from a recognised institute are eligible fot the MBA programme at JNTUA. Eligible candidates must apply via JNTUA's official website and follow the admission procedure. Candidates must later participated in the counselling process to get seat allottment for the MBA programme. Additionally, candidates must qualify in the national-level entrance exams, such as:APICETCATMAH CETTSICET

faqs.question: How should I prepare to get admission to MBA at JNTUA?
faqs.answer: JNTU Anantapur MBA admissionis entirely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for the programme must appear for the accepted entrance exam. Aspirants need to appear and secure a valid score in any of the following exams; APICET, MAHCET, TSICET, and CAT.  Students who qualify theJNTUA cutoffneed to participate in the further selection rounds. For a successful admission, prepare well for the entrance exams. Attempt as manyCAT mock testsas possible, read theCAT Syllabuswell, and timely register

faqs.question: Does JNTUA accept CAT score for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Anantapur does accept CAT scores for its MBA course admission. Apart from CAT, the university also accepts various national and state-level entrance exams, such as APICET, MAH CET, and TSICET. Students seeking to apply for the course must satisfy the admission criteria of the course as specified by the university's admission guidelines. Interested students can visit the official website of the university to know more about the course.

placement_data.title: JNTU Anantapur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: JNTUA is yet to release its official placement report for 2024 howevre, the NIRF report 2025 has been released. As per the NIRF report a total of 510 BTech students secured placements during JNTUA placements. Additionally, 68 out of 134 MTech students were placed. The median salary for both BTech and MTech stood at INR 4.20 LPA . Since last year the median package for MTech has increased by 5% .

tables.context: How are the placements at JNTU Anantapur?

faqs.question: What is the highest package at JNTU Anantapur placements?
faqs.answer: JNTU, Anantapur has not yet announced its the highest package for 2024; however, the median package for both courses, BTech and M.Tech stood at INR 4.20 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at JNTU, Anantapur?
faqs.answer: JNTU, Anantapur placement rate has not been published, but in 2024, 510 students were placed out of 998 students in BTech. While 68 students out of 134 secured placements in MTech.

faqs.question: How are the placements at JNTU Anantapur?
faqs.answer: The table below presents JNTU, Anantapura placement report, according to the NIRF report 2025: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Total students 998 (BTech) 134 (MTech) No. of students placed 510 (BTech) 68 (MTech) Median package INR 4.20 LPA (BTech) INR 4.20 LPA (MTech) NOTE: The data has been taken from the NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Anantapur?
faqs.answer: MBA is PG course in Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Anantapur. The fees of MBA course is around INR 60,000. The placement percentage is low. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, Infosys, Wipro and many other visit the campus every year for placement. It is worth noting that students who score above 75% are eligible to sit in the coding test while below 50% may not be eligible for placement. In 2021, average package was INR 3.84 LPA while in 2023 it increased to INR 5 LPA. Hence, the placement percentage is fairly low.

highlights.description: JNTU Anantapur is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies, both national & international, have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #1001–1200 by the Times Higher Education 2026 under the category Overall. At the global level, the QS World 2026 ranked the institute at #254 position. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the JNTU Anantapur rankings.

nirf.description:
Over the years, JNTU Anantapur is consistently recognised as a top institution in different categories by NIRF 2024 among other universities by excelling in key areas such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and providing a great learning environment. In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend as per the previous year's rankings. In 2024, JNTU Anantapur's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. Students can check the table below for the JNTU Anantapur NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
JNTU Anantapur has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Anurag UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college, not as much as IITs or NITs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in this college compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi is also available. Also, they provide a canteen which is very good, but it is expensive and has a limited quantity. Hostels are also provided up to 1 lac fees per year with AC and without AC. The canteen food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Anurag UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My review of my college, Anurag University.
reviews.review_text: Anurag University's infrastructure is really good, with beautiful new, unique paintings on the walls of the blocks, and the building design is different, with minimal space for corridors. The college grounds are for different sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society’s Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My experiences in college.
reviews.review_text: There is only a girls' hostel in our college, not for boys. Boys should stay in private hostels near the college. For girls, it looks like there is good infrastructure, food and facilities in their hostel. About the college, we have fully equipped labs and a library for peaceful studying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and maintenance.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, but access is not given to the students. The Wi-Fi is available to the computers in the labs. The library has a wide range of books written by famous authors in the electronics field. The accommodation in the hostel is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering, TirupatiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Totally good at all equipment and I am really satisfied in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for our course is good. Many computers in the labs are working well, and the internet is also good at any time, which affects practical classes. Classrooms have digital boards, and all teachers are comfortable using them effectively. The library has a decent collection of books, but the space could be better maintained. Hostel facilities are manageable, the rooms are okay. The hostel food is simple and edible, though the menu does not change much. Medical support is a...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am an ECE student. The lab facilities are good, and it is open until 7:00 PM. Wi-Fi facility is available for all the systems in the labs. The library has various books related to the core branches, which are written by the best authors. The hostel has a garden to relax in front of the main building. The hostel Wi-Fi is also good, and mineral water is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is good at examinations.
reviews.review_text: Hostel accommodation for the B.Tech boys is available in boy's hostel located adjacent to the college campus. Seats will be filled on first-cum-first serve base. In boys hostel, the fee per year for an ordinary room (common bathroom) is Rs. 70,500. The fee for a special room (attached bathroom) is Rs. 75,500.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average curriculum, and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped laboratories with advanced technology, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a good library. Infrastructure is well-maintained. Hostels have decent facilities, hygienic mess and canteen food, basic medical support, and good sports and games facilities for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall good but education is poor.
reviews.review_text: All are good. When it comes to infrastructure, this is okay; in some blocks, there is no vacancy for classes. The department library is very good. The food is good, but no chicken. The canteen is good with a couple of options. Clean rooms, friendly staff, safe stay, and great value here!

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society’s Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The campus life is worth living.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are absolutely fine, not just fine, but very good infrastructure. Lab facilities are really wonderful, and the computers are really fast, no issues with them. If there are any issues, they will be solved on time so that we can practice more towards our goal.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society’s Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good and better satisfied with the faculty, and have no idea about placements.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper Wi-Fi, and about labs, there are no proper systems and if the system works keyboard and mouse doesn't work properly. In the library, we get all types of books. In the hostels, there is good food and clean water for other purposes, like domestic, etc. Canteens are neat and clean, and we get all the food from the canteen. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are also conducted yearly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society’s Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good for academic purposes, and placement opportunities should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, library, and cafeteria are present in our college. Indoor and outdoor sports are conducted and encouraged in our college. Only a girls' hostel is present in our college. The food provided in our college is clean and tasty. The canteen consists of various menus at a reasonable price.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G. Pulla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements with supportive faculty, relevant curriculum, and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am living in the college hostel, everything is fine. The food is so delicious but there is only vegetarian food. They don't provide non-vegetarian food. I don't know what the reason but the vegetarian food is so tasty. The infrastructure also looks good and the hostel is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Madanapalle Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Strong academics with supportive faculty, good infrastructure, and improving placement opportunities
reviews.review_text: In the MITS College there is facility of hostel. We want to take separate hostel outside of college. The college infrastructure is good, having good equipment's in labs and Wi-Fi facility, and having central library and big block for the Computer Science lab. The classrooms are also very neat and having projector in each class with good infrastructure.

college_info.college_name: JNTU Anantapur

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JNTUA - Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur

likes.text: Software companies like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, etc, and many more core companies hire students from our college.
Good placements are available, best companies are ready to take the students, but mainly CSE, ECE, EEE got more opportunities compared to remaining branches.

likes.text: There are a lot of facilities like Wi-Fi, good infrastructural labs, seminar halls to conduct classes and a department library.
The infrastructure of our college is good in classrooms as well as hostels, But the food may not be as good as you think.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teachers are helpful and qualified, and they are much knowledgeable about their respective subjects.
Only the course curriculum is not enough to make students industry-ready, but also self-learning with this course curriculum is helpful to be industry-ready.

likes.text: This course is the best one and I opted this course because I am so much interested in the electrical sector and there is more practical knowledge.
Students from all the colleges visit our college for fests, and that will be a great time for both fun wise and knowledge-wise.

faqs.answer: A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences is INR 2.1 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.
faqs.question: What is the median placement salary offered to the students of Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences programmes is around INR 1,50,000 to 2,80,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences is a well-known institution for M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences has course specializations in Pharmaceutical, Quality Assurance .
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good faculty, quality teaching and good placement records.

review_content.Placements: 60% students got placed with above average packages. They got placement in Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, etc. and they got top companies for internship programs. Almost all the students got good companies for their internships. Generally, after B.Pharma, you get a chance to join as a QA, QC, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good along with it being a Wi-Fi campus. The college has AC classrooms, library, healthy food services, fast treatments, along with extra curricular activities like sports, dancing, yoga classes, tree plantation programs, etc. The college has a healthy environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I love medical and medicinal professional so I chose pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Around 45% of students get placements every year as others opt for our course. The average salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 4 LPA. Many students get placements in top recruiting companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, MacLeod, etc. Many students attend internships programs in online and offline modes. About 60% of students get internships in medical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, but there are many labs for practicals. The classrooms are very huge for students are comfortable. Our library has many books as per authors and old pharmacy book and literature. The quality of food is good and the hostel is also good. It also depends on the students how they manage to take care of themselves. There are 6 beds per room.

review_summary.college_name: Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college for pharmacy. Highly recommend for students interested in this course.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are interested in the course. The salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per year. Top recruiting companies are searching for brilliant students, and students are very talented. Every student to attend daily classes for a bright future. Top roles include the B Pharma course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college library and classrooms are very good. Canteen food is very good, and meals are available in the hostel canteen. Every student is very happy with this type of meal. Our hostel is cleaned every day. Bathrooms are very neat and clean. Mineral water is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: All about Royal College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Nowadays, placement is important through college. Royal College of Pharmacy also provides placement in pharmacy industry giants such as Cipla, Meclodus, Hector, etc. The lowest package is approximately 14k per month, and the maximum package is 25k per month upon joining the industry. It will increase with your experience.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is not bad. It offers 24-hour free Wi-Fi, good labs covering every chemical needed for pharmacy studies. Classrooms are well-equipped with AC and projectors. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls near the college, and the hostel food is very good. Various outdoor sports are available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good faculty, quality teaching and good placement records.

content.Placements: 60% students got placed with above average packages. They got placement in Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, etc. and they got top companies for internship programs. Almost all the students got good companies for their internships. Generally, after B.Pharma, you get a chance to join as a QA, QC, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good along with it being a Wi-Fi campus. The college has AC classrooms, library, healthy food services, fast treatments, along with extra curricular activities like sports, dancing, yoga classes, tree plantation programs, etc. The college has a healthy environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I love medical and medicinal professional so I chose pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 45% of students get placements every year as others opt for our course. The average salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 4 LPA. Many students get placements in top recruiting companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, MacLeod, etc. Many students attend internships programs in online and offline modes. About 60% of students get internships in medical companies.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, but there are many labs for practicals. The classrooms are very huge for students are comfortable. Our library has many books as per authors and old pharmacy book and literature. The quality of food is good and the hostel is also good. It also depends on the students how they manage to take care of themselves. There are 6 beds per room.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college, course, and faculty members, but not satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Students here get recruited into good industries. Most of the batches choose higher studies, and some like placements, so they decide to join companies. About 68% of the students got placed in reputed companies. The lowest salary package offered is Rs. 14,000 per month and the highest is Rs. 60,000 per month. The top recruiting companies for our college are Medriech, Sanofi, Cipla, Sun Pharma, MacLeod, and Dr. Reddy's labs. About 90% of students get internships in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides air-conditioning in classrooms only in the summer. We have good laboratories. We have a good library which contains old pharmacy and medical books, old cology and old plant books. In our hostel, one room can accommodate six students. Six beds are provided, and rooms are well-ventilated. Students get 7 non-vegetarian meals per week and 3 vegetarian meals per day.

hostel_campus.college_name: Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pharmacy. Highly recommend for students interested in this course.
reviews.review_text: Our college library and classrooms are very good. Canteen food is very good, and meals are available in the hostel canteen. Every student is very happy with this type of meal. Our hostel is cleaned every day. Bathrooms are very neat and clean. Mineral water is available.

reviews.review_heading: All about Royal College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. It offers 24-hour free Wi-Fi, good labs covering every chemical needed for pharmacy studies. Classrooms are well-equipped with AC and projectors. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls near the college, and the hostel food is very good. Various outdoor sports are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good faculty, quality teaching and good placement records.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good along with it being a Wi-Fi campus. The college has AC classrooms, library, healthy food services, fast treatments, along with extra curricular activities like sports, dancing, yoga classes, tree plantation programs, etc. The college has a healthy environment.

reviews.review_heading: I love medical and medicinal professional so I chose pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but there are many labs for practicals. The classrooms are very huge for students are comfortable. Our library has many books as per authors and old pharmacy book and literature. The quality of food is good and the hostel is also good. It also depends on the students how they manage to take care of themselves. There are 6 beds per room.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, course, and faculty members, but not satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides air-conditioning in classrooms only in the summer. We have good laboratories. We have a good library which contains old pharmacy and medical books, old cology and old plant books. In our hostel, one room can accommodate six students. Six beds are provided, and rooms are well-ventilated. Students get 7 non-vegetarian meals per week and 3 vegetarian meals per day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but there are many labs for practicals. The classrooms are very big for students to be comfortable. Our library has many books as per authors. The quality of food is good, and the hostel is good. It also depends on how students manage to take care of themselves.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is good but there is no Wi-Fi access on the campus.
reviews.review_text: The building is average. They serve delicious food in the hostel canteen. Our hostel is situated on the college campus Behind our college, there is another hostel for girls. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and the environment is good for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good, well-qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, a library, and a state-of-the-art seminar room. There are computer labs, pharma instrumental labs, chemistry labs, etc. Hostels are spacious and comfortable. The hostels provide all the basic amenities like water purifiers, common rooms, recreation rooms, a mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance systems, etc. There are separate hostels on campus for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and hostel, but the placements and faculty are bad.
reviews.review_text: The campus has 3 main buildings, one for academics, and the other two are girls' and boys' hostels. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls. We are provided with meals 3 times a day and good drinking water. But the prices are expensive to decent.

reviews.review_heading: The reason to choose Royal College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are good with enough space to obey the COVID protocols. There are enough classrooms for students of every year. We have different kinds of laboratories with all equipment. We have a computer lab. Some classes and halls have air-conditioning system. We have separate hostels for both boys and girls. Drinking water is available with cold water as well. CCTV enabled campus so we can live there without worries.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Royal College of Pharmacy and Health Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Students are now focusing on the labs, classrooms, etc. while selecting a college. Classrooms are well designed with technologies for students' comfort. A library is always available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best pharmacy college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best equipment which is to be used by the pharma company. The college does not provide Wi-Fi. But laboratories are well designed as per protocols. The library is present where all types of books for the study are available. Classrooms are attached with CCTV and a projector. The hostel is nearer to the campus. Separate hostel for boys and girls are there, the food served in the mess is good. The Medicine store is there, and the sports are organised every year.

reviews.review_heading: Students love this course for good placements, and the college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, it provides an air-conditioner classroom and well-mentioned laboratories, and a good library which contains old pharmacy books and medical journals. In our hostel, one room 6 students are placed and 6 bed facility are provided, and the well-ventilated room is present. Students get 7 times non-vegetarian per week and 3 times meal per day.

reviews.review_heading: Very good memories and I never forget my college life.
reviews.review_text: Building is not so big or small. Its average with a delicious food by providing in hostel canteen. And our hostel is situated in the college campus and behind our college there is another hostel for girls. Campus is full of Wi-Fi and environment is good for study.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good pharmacy college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities to make students know about the industrial environment. All the instruments are in good working conditions, and all students should handle, use and learn them to utilize. The library is supplied with lacs of books with guides and Wi-Fi. Hostel food is good. Bathrooms are hygienic and good in condition.
